Content:
# Tailscale with Amnezia-WG 2.0 (v1.88.2+)

[![GitHub Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/LiuTangLei/tailscale)](https://github.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale/releases/latest)
[![Platform Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/platform-Linux%20|%20macOS%20|%20Windows%20|%20OpenWrt%20|%20Android-blue)](https://github.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale/releases/latest)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-BSD--3--Clause-green)](LICENSE)

Enhanced Tailscale client with Amnezia-WG 2.0 obfuscation: junk traffic, protocol signatures, and handshake/header masquerading to resist DPI and blocking. Until you enable AWG settings, it behaves like standard Tailscale.

Languages: [English](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/README.md) | [中文](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/doc/README-zh.md) | [فارسی](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/doc/README-fa.md) | [Русский](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/doc/README-ru.md)

For AWG v1.5 documentation, see [doc/README-awg-v1.5.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/doc/README-awg-v1.5.md).

## Installation

| Platform | Command / Action |
| --- | --- |
| Linux | `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-linux.sh \| bash` |
| macOS* | `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-macos.sh \| bash` |
| Windows (Admin PowerShell) | `iwr -useb https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-windows.ps1 \| iex` |
| OpenWrt | See [OpenWrt Installation](#openwrt-installation) |
| Android | Download APK from [releases](https://github.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-android/releases) |

- macOS: the installer uses CLI-only `tailscaled`. If the official Tailscale.app is detected, you'll be prompted to remove it to avoid conflicts.
- Android currently supports AWG config sync only. Use the in-app Sync button.

![Android AWG Sync Example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/doc/sync1.jpg)

## Docker Compose

The repository includes `docker-compose.yml` for running `tailscaled` with AWG support.

- State is stored in `./tailscale-state` next to the compose file, so node state and AWG settings survive container restarts and host reboots.
- If you are upgrading from the old bind mount `/var/lib/tailscale:/var/lib/tailscale`, copy the existing state first:
Translation:
# Tailscale con Amnezia-WG 2.0 (v1.88.2+)

[![GitHub Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/LiuTangLei/tailscale)](https://github.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale/releases/latest)
[![Platform Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/platform-Linux%20|%20macOS%20|%20Windows%20|%20OpenWrt%20|%20Android-blue)](https://github.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale/releases/latest)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-BSD--3--Clause-green)](LICENSE)

Cliente Tailscale mejorado con ofuscación Amnezia-WG 2.0: tráfico basura, firmas de protocolo y disfraz de apretón de manos/cabecera para resistir DPI y bloqueos. Hasta que habilites las configuraciones AWG, se comporta como el Tailscale estándar.

Idiomas: [English](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/README.md) | [中文](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/doc/README-zh.md) | [فارسی](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/doc/README-fa.md) | [Русский](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/doc/README-ru.md)

Para la documentación de AWG v1.5, vea [doc/README-awg-v1.5.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/doc/README-awg-v1.5.md).

## Instalación

| Plataforma | Comando / Acción |
| --- | --- |
| Linux | `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-linux.sh \| bash` |
| macOS* | `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-macos.sh \| bash` |
| Windows (PowerShell Admin) | `iwr -useb https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-windows.ps1 \| iex` |
| OpenWrt | Ver [Instalación en OpenWrt](#openwrt-installation) |
| Android | Descargar APK desde [releases](https://github.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-android/releases) |

- macOS: el instalador usa solo CLI `tailscaled`. Si se detecta la app oficial Tailscale.app, se te pedirá eliminarla para evitar conflictos.
- Android actualmente solo soporta sincronización de configuración AWG. Usa el botón Sincronizar dentro de la app.

![Ejemplo de sincronización AWG en Android](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/doc/sync1.jpg)

## Docker Compose

El repositorio incluye `docker-compose.yml` para ejecutar `tailscaled` con soporte AWG.

- El estado se guarda en `./tailscale-state` junto al archivo compose, por lo que el estado del nodo y las configuraciones AWG sobreviven a reinicios del contenedor y del host.
- Si actualizas desde el antiguo montaje de enlace `/var/lib/tailscale:/var/lib/tailscale`, copia primero el estado existente:

RowTranslations.originContent: Enhanced Tailscale client with Amnezia-WG 2.0 obfuscation: junk traffic, protocol signatures, and handshake/header masquerading to resist DPI and blocking. Until you enable AWG settings, it behaves like standard Tailscale.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Cliente Tailscale mejorado con ofuscación Amnezia-WG 2.0: tráfico basura, firmas de protocolo y disfraz de apretón de manos/cabecera para resistir DPI y bloqueos. Hasta que habilites las configuraciones AWG, se comporta como el Tailscale estándar.
Para la documentación de AWG v1.5, vea [doc/README-awg-v1.5.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/doc/README-awg-v1.5.md).

RowTranslations.originContent: - macOS: the installer uses CLI-only `tailscaled`. If the official Tailscale.app is detected, you'll be prompted to remove it to avoid conflicts.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - macOS: el instalador usa solo CLI `tailscaled`. Si se detecta la app oficial Tailscale.app, se te pedirá eliminarla para evitar conflictos.

RowTranslations.originContent: - Android currently supports AWG config sync only. Use the in-app Sync button.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - Android actualmente solo soporta sincronización de configuración AWG. Usa el botón Sincronizar dentro de la app.

RowTranslations.originContent: The repository includes `docker-compose.yml` for running `tailscaled` with AWG support.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: El repositorio incluye `docker-compose.yml` para ejecutar `tailscaled` con soporte AWG.

RowTranslations.originContent: - State is stored in `./tailscale-state` next to the compose file, so node state and AWG settings survive container restarts and host reboots.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - El estado se guarda en `./tailscale-state` junto al archivo compose, por lo que el estado del nodo y las configuraciones AWG sobreviven a reinicios del contenedor y del host.

RowTranslations.originContent: - If you are upgrading from the old bind mount `/var/lib/tailscale:/var/lib/tailscale`, copy the existing state first:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - Si actualizas desde el antiguo montaje de enlace `/var/lib/tailscale:/var/lib/tailscale`, copia primero el estado existente:

Content:
```bash
docker compose down
cp -a /var/lib/tailscale ./tailscale-state
# update docker-compose.yml
docker compose up -d
```
Translation:
```bash
docker compose down
cp -a /var/lib/tailscale ./tailscale-state
# update docker-compose.yml
docker compose up -d
```

Content:
Basic flow:

1. Start the service: `docker compose up -d`
2. Authenticate inside the container: `docker compose exec tailscaled tailscale up`
3. Run AWG commands the same way, for example: `docker compose exec tailscaled tailscale awg sync`

If you use Headscale, add `--login-server https://your-headscale-domain` to `tailscale up`.

Optional host alias:
Translation:
Flujo básico:

1. Inicie el servicio: `docker compose up -d`
2. Autentíquese dentro del contenedor: `docker compose exec tailscaled tailscale up`
3. Ejecute los comandos AWG de la misma manera, por ejemplo: `docker compose exec tailscaled tailscale awg sync`

Si utiliza Headscale, agregue `--login-server https://your-headscale-domain` a `tailscale up`.

Alias opcional del host:

RowTranslations.originContent: 2. Authenticate inside the container: `docker compose exec tailscaled tailscale up`
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 2. Autentíquese dentro del contenedor: `docker compose exec tailscaled tailscale up`

RowTranslations.originContent: 3. Run AWG commands the same way, for example: `docker compose exec tailscaled tailscale awg sync`
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 3. Ejecute los comandos AWG de la misma manera, por ejemplo: `docker compose exec tailscaled tailscale awg sync`

RowTranslations.originContent: If you use Headscale, add `--login-server https://your-headscale-domain` to `tailscale up`.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Si utiliza Headscale, agregue `--login-server https://your-headscale-domain` a `tailscale up`.

Content:
```bash
alias tailscale='docker exec -it tailscaled tailscale'
```
Translation:
```bash
alias tailscale='docker exec -it tailscaled tailscale'
```

Content:
That alias only applies to the current shell. To keep it after reboot or a new terminal session, add it to `~/.bashrc` or `~/.zshrc` and reload your shell.

## OpenWrt Installation

## Instalación de OpenWrt

Comando predeterminado:

wget -O /usr/bin/install.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/openwrt-tailscale-awg/main/install_en.sh && chmod +x /usr/bin/install.sh && /usr/bin/install.sh
```

```

## Mirrors

If GitHub is slow or blocked, you can self-host a prefix mirror such as `https://your-mirror-site.com`:
Translation:
Este script es un fork de [GuNanOvO/openwrt-tailscale](https://github.com/GuNanOvO/openwrt-tailscale).

## Espejos

Si GitHub está lento o bloqueado, puedes alojar un espejo de prefijo como `https://tu-sitio-espejo.com`:

RowTranslations.translatedContent: Este script es un fork de [GuNanOvO/openwrt-tailscale](https://github.com/GuNanOvO/openwrt-tailscale).

RowTranslations.originContent: If GitHub is slow or blocked, you can self-host a prefix mirror such as `https://your-mirror-site.com`:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Si GitHub está lento o bloqueado, puedes alojar un espejo de prefijo como `https://tu-sitio-espejo.com`:

Content:
```bash
# Linux
curl -fsSL https://your-mirror-site.com/https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-linux.sh | bash -s -- --mirror https://your-mirror-site.com

# macOS
curl -fsSL https://your-mirror-site.com/https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-macos.sh | bash -s -- --mirror https://your-mirror-site.com
```
Translation:
```bash
# Linux
curl -fsSL https://your-mirror-site.com/https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-linux.sh | bash -s -- --mirror https://your-mirror-site.com

# macOS
curl -fsSL https://your-mirror-site.com/https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-macos.sh | bash -s -- --mirror https://your-mirror-site.com
```

Content:
```powershell
# Windows
$scriptContent = (iwr -useb https://your-mirror-site.com/https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-windows.ps1).Content; $scriptBlock = [scriptblock]::Create($scriptContent); & $scriptBlock -MirrorPrefix 'https://your-mirror-site.com/'
```
Translation:
```powershell
# Windows
$scriptContent = (iwr -useb https://your-mirror-site.com/https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LiuTangLei/tailscale-awg-installer/main/install-windows.ps1).Content; $scriptBlock = [scriptblock]::Create($scriptContent); & $scriptBlock -MirrorPrefix 'https://your-mirror-site.com/'
```

If PowerShell blocks execution, use `Set-ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned` or `Bypass -Scope Process`.

## Quick Start

Tip: `tailscale amnezia-wg` is the same as `tailscale awg`.

1. Log in:

Si PowerShell bloquea la ejecución, use `Set-ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned` o `Bypass -Scope Process`.

## Inicio rápido

Consejo: `tailscale amnezia-wg` es lo mismo que `tailscale awg`.

1. Inicie sesión:

RowTranslations.originContent: If PowerShell blocks execution, use `Set-ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned` or `Bypass -Scope Process`.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Si PowerShell bloquea la ejecución, use `Set-ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned` o `Bypass -Scope Process`.

```bash
# Official control server
tailscale up

# Headscale
tailscale up --login-server https://your-headscale-domain
```
Translation:
```bash
# Official control server
tailscale up

# Headscale
tailscale up --login-server https://your-headscale-domain
```

Content: 2. Configure AWG:
Translation: 2. Configure AWG:

Content:
```bash
tailscale awg set
```
Translation:
```bash
tailscale awg set
```

Content:
Press Enter at the auto-generation prompt to generate recommended values for everything except `i1`-`i5`.

3. On other devices, sync the same AWG config from this already-configured node:

- Desktop: run `tailscale awg sync` on the other device
- Android: tap Sync in the app on the other device

4. Verify or reset when needed:
Translation:
Presione Enter en el aviso de auto-generación para generar valores recomendados para todo excepto `i1`-`i5`.

3. En otros dispositivos, sincronice la misma configuración AWG desde este nodo ya configurado:

- Escritorio: ejecute `tailscale awg sync` en el otro dispositivo
- Android: toque Sincronizar en la aplicación del otro dispositivo

4. Verifique o restablezca cuando sea necesario:

RowTranslations.originContent: Press Enter at the auto-generation prompt to generate recommended values for everything except `i1`-`i5`.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Presione Enter en el aviso de auto-generación para generar valores recomendados para todo excepto `i1`-`i5`.

RowTranslations.originContent: 3. On other devices, sync the same AWG config from this already-configured node:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 3. En otros dispositivos, sincronice la misma configuración AWG desde este nodo ya configurado:

RowTranslations.originContent: - Desktop: run `tailscale awg sync` on the other device
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - Escritorio: ejecute `tailscale awg sync` en el otro dispositivo

RowTranslations.originContent: - Android: tap Sync in the app on the other device
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - Android: toque Sincronizar en la aplicación del otro dispositivo
4. Verifique o restablezca cuando sea necesario:

Content:
```bash
tailscale awg get
tailscale awg reset
```
Translation:
```bash
tailscale awg get
tailscale awg reset
```

Content:
## Configuration Presets

| Goal | Example | Compatibility |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Basic junk traffic | `tailscale awg set '{"jc":4,"jmin":64,"jmax":256}'` | Works with standard Tailscale peers |
| Junk traffic + signatures | `tailscale awg set '{"jc":2,"jmin":64,"jmax":128,"i1":"<b 0x40><r 12>"}'` | Works with standard Tailscale peers |
| Handshake masquerading | `tailscale awg set '{"s1":10,"s2":15,"s3":8,"s4":0}'` | All AWG nodes must use the same `s1`-`s4` |
| Full masquerading | `tailscale awg set '{"s1":10,"s2":15,"s3":8,"s4":0,"h1":{"min":100000,"max":200000},"h2":{"min":300000,"max":350000},"h3":{"min":400000,"max":450000},"h4":{"min":500000,"max":550000}}'` | All AWG nodes must use the same `s1`-`s4` and `h1`-`h4` |
| Full masquerading + signatures | `tailscale awg set '{"s1":10,"s2":15,"s3":8,"s4":0,"h1":{"min":100000,"max":200000},"h2":{"min":300000,"max":350000},"h3":{"min":400000,"max":450000},"h4":{"min":500000,"max":550000},"i1":"<b 0xc0><r 32><c><t>"}'` | `i1`-`i5` may differ per node; `s1`-`s4` and `h1`-`h4` must match |

## Parameter Reference

- `jc` with `jmin` and `jmax`: junk packet count and size range.
- `i1`-`i5`: optional CPS (Custom Protocol Signature) chain for custom protocol-mimicking packets.
- `s1`-`s4`: handshake padding or prefix fields; all AWG nodes must match.
- `h1`-`h4`: header field ranges in the form `{"min": low, "max": high}`; either set all four or none. The ranges must not overlap, and all AWG nodes must match.

Very large junk counts or long signature chains increase latency and bandwidth usage.

## Platform Support

| Platform | Arch | Status |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Linux | x86_64, ARM64 | ✅ Full |
| macOS | Intel, Apple Silicon | ✅ Full |
| Windows | x86_64, ARM64 | ✅ Installer |
| OpenWrt | Various | ✅ Script |
| Android | ARM64, ARM | ✅ APK (sync-only AWG) |

## Advanced: CPS Protocol Signatures

CPS means Custom Protocol Signature. It lets you assemble custom obfuscation packets that can imitate arbitrary protocol headers; it is not limited to one specific protocol.

CPS format:
Translation:
## Preajustes de Configuración

| Objetivo | Ejemplo | Compatibilidad |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Tráfico basura básico | `tailscale awg set '{"jc":4,"jmin":64,"jmax":256}'` | Funciona con pares estándar de Tailscale |
| Tráfico basura + firmas | `tailscale awg set '{"jc":2,"jmin":64,"jmax":128,"i1":"<b 0x40><r 12>"}'` | Funciona con pares estándar de Tailscale |
| Simulación de handshake | `tailscale awg set '{"s1":10,"s2":15,"s3":8,"s4":0}'` | Todos los nodos AWG deben usar el mismo `s1`-`s4` |
| Simulación completa | `tailscale awg set '{"s1":10,"s2":15,"s3":8,"s4":0,"h1":{"min":100000,"max":200000},"h2":{"min":300000,"max":350000},"h3":{"min":400000,"max":450000},"h4":{"min":500000,"max":550000}}'` | Todos los nodos AWG deben usar el mismo `s1`-`s4` y `h1`-`h4` |
| Simulación completa + firmas | `tailscale awg set '{"s1":10,"s2":15,"s3":8,"s4":0,"h1":{"min":100000,"max":200000},"h2":{"min":300000,"max":350000},"h3":{"min":400000,"max":450000},"h4":{"min":500000,"max":550000},"i1":"<b 0xc0><r 32><c><t>"}'` | `i1`-`i5` pueden variar por nodo; `s1`-`s4` y `h1`-`h4` deben coincidir |

## Referencia de Parámetros

- `jc` con `jmin` y `jmax`: cuenta de paquetes basura y rango de tamaño.
- `i1`-`i5`: cadena CPS opcional (Firma de Protocolo Personalizado) para paquetes que imitan protocolos personalizados.
- `s1`-`s4`: campos de relleno o prefijo del handshake; todos los nodos AWG deben coincidir.
- `h1`-`h4`: rangos de campos de encabezado en la forma `{"min": bajo, "max": alto}`; se deben establecer los cuatro o ninguno. Los rangos no deben superponerse y todos los nodos AWG deben coincidir.

Cuentas muy grandes de basura o cadenas largas de firmas aumentan la latencia y el uso de ancho de banda.

## Soporte de Plataforma

| Plataforma | Arquitectura | Estado |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Linux | x86_64, ARM64 | ✅ Completo |
| macOS | Intel, Apple Silicon | ✅ Completo |
| Windows | x86_64, ARM64 | ✅ Instalador |
| OpenWrt | Varias | ✅ Script |
| Android | ARM64, ARM | ✅ APK (AWG solo sincronización) |

## Avanzado: Firmas de Protocolo CPS

CPS significa Firma de Protocolo Personalizado. Permite ensamblar paquetes de ofuscación personalizados que pueden imitar encabezados de protocolos arbitrarios; no está limitado a un protocolo específico.

Formato CPS:

RowTranslations.originContent: | Basic junk traffic | `tailscale awg set '{"jc":4,"jmin":64,"jmax":256}'` | Works with standard Tailscale peers |
RowTranslations.translatedContent: | Tráfico basura básico | `tailscale awg set '{"jc":4,"jmin":64,"jmax":256}'` | Funciona con pares estándar de Tailscale |

RowTranslations.originContent: | Junk traffic + signatures | `tailscale awg set '{"jc":2,"jmin":64,"jmax":128,"i1":"<b 0x40><r 12>"}'` | Works with standard Tailscale peers |
RowTranslations.translatedContent: | Tráfico basura + firmas | `tailscale awg set '{"jc":2,"jmin":64,"jmax":128,"i1":"<b 0x40><r 12>"}'` | Funciona con pares estándar de Tailscale |

RowTranslations.originContent: | Handshake masquerading | `tailscale awg set '{"s1":10,"s2":15,"s3":8,"s4":0}'` | All AWG nodes must use the same `s1`-`s4` |
RowTranslations.translatedContent: | Simulación de handshake | `tailscale awg set '{"s1":10,"s2":15,"s3":8,"s4":0}'` | Todos los nodos AWG deben usar el mismo `s1`-`s4` |

| Simulación completa | `tailscale awg set '{"s1":10,"s2":15,"s3":8,"s4":0,"h1":{"min":100000,"max":200000},"h2":{"min":300000,"max":350000},"h3":{"min":400000,"max":450000},"h4":{"min":500000,"max":550000}}'` | Todos los nodos AWG deben usar el mismo `s1`-`s4` y `h1`-`h4` |

RowTranslations.originContent: - `jc` with `jmin` and `jmax`: junk packet count and size range.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - `jc` con `jmin` y `jmax`: cuenta de paquetes basura y rango de tamaño.

RowTranslations.originContent: - `i1`-`i5`: optional CPS (Custom Protocol Signature) chain for custom protocol-mimicking packets.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - `i1`-`i5`: cadena CPS opcional (Firma de Protocolo Personalizado) para paquetes que imitan protocolos personalizados.

RowTranslations.originContent: - `s1`-`s4`: handshake padding or prefix fields; all AWG nodes must match.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - `s1`-`s4`: campos de relleno o prefijo del handshake; todos los nodos AWG deben coincidir.

RowTranslations.originContent: - `h1`-`h4`: header field ranges in the form `{"min": low, "max": high}`; either set all four or none. The ranges must not overlap, and all AWG nodes must match.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - `h1`-`h4`: rangos de campos de encabezado en la forma `{"min": bajo, "max": alto}`; se deben establecer los cuatro o ninguno. Los rangos no deben superponerse y todos los nodos AWG deben coincidir.

RowTranslations.originContent: Very large junk counts or long signature chains increase latency and bandwidth usage.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Cuentas muy grandes de basura o cadenas largas de firmas aumentan la latencia y el uso de ancho de banda.
| Android | ARM64, ARM | ✅ APK (AWG solo sincronización) |

RowTranslations.originContent: CPS means Custom Protocol Signature. It lets you assemble custom obfuscation packets that can imitate arbitrary protocol headers; it is not limited to one specific protocol.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: CPS significa Firma de Protocolo Personalizado. Permite ensamblar paquetes de ofuscación personalizados que pueden imitar encabezados de protocolos arbitrarios; no está limitado a un protocolo específico.

Content:
```text
i{n} = <tag1><tag2>...<tagN>
```
Translation:
```text
i{n} = <tag1><tag2>...<tagN>
```

Content:
Tags:

- `<b 0xHEX>`: static bytes
- `<r N>`: secure random bytes
- `<c>`: counter
- `<t>`: timestamp

Example:
Translation:
Etiquetas:

- `<b 0xHEX>`: bytes estáticos
- `<r N>`: bytes aleatorios seguros
- `<c>`: contador
- `<t>`: marca de tiempo

Ejemplo:

Content:
```text
i1 = <b 0xf6ab3267fa><c><b 0xf6ab><t><r 10>
```
Translation:
```text
i1 = <b 0xf6ab3267fa><c><b 0xf6ab><t><r 10>
```

Content:
If `i1` is unset, `i2`-`i5` are skipped.

## Troubleshooting

Verify installation:
Translation:
Si `i1` no está configurado, se omiten `i2`-`i5`.

## Solución de problemas

Verifique la instalación:

RowTranslations.translatedContent: Si `i1` no está configurado, se omiten `i2`-`i5`.

Content:
```bash
tailscale version
tailscale awg get
```
Translation:
```bash
tailscale version
tailscale awg get
```

Content: If connectivity breaks, reset to standard WireGuard and start from a simple preset:
Translation: Si la conectividad se interrumpe, restablezca a WireGuard estándar y comience desde una configuración simple:

RowTranslations.originContent: If connectivity breaks, reset to standard WireGuard and start from a simple preset:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Si la conectividad se interrumpe, restablezca a WireGuard estándar y comience desde una configuración simple:

Content:
```bash
tailscale awg reset
tailscale awg set '{"jc":2,"jmin":64,"jmax":128}'
sudo journalctl -u tailscaled -f
```
Translation:
```bash
tailscale awg reset
tailscale awg set '{"jc":2,"jmin":64,"jmax":128}'
sudo journalctl -u tailscaled -f
```

Content: On Windows PowerShell, prefer interactive setup to avoid JSON escaping issues:
Translation: En Windows PowerShell, prefiera la configuración interactiva para evitar problemas de escape JSON:

RowTranslations.originContent: On Windows PowerShell, prefer interactive setup to avoid JSON escaping issues:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: En Windows PowerShell, prefiera la configuración interactiva para evitar problemas de escape JSON:

Content:
```powershell
tailscale awg set
```
Translation:
```powershell
tailscale awg set
```
